title: dortmanna ovata
intro: Dortmanna ovata, also known as Toothache Plant, is a tropical plant species native to the Americas and the Caribbean, characterized by its distinctive, tooth-shaped leaves. Traditionally, the plant's leaves and stems have been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including toothaches, fever, and digestive problems, due to their anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Dortmanna ovata include pain relief, reduced inflammation, and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and terpenoids. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to alleviate symptoms of toothaches, sore throats, and respiratory issues.
